# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Member User File Uploads
Description: Allows logged-in users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ using $_FILES.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: Your Company
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class Member_User_File_Uploads {
    const NONCE_ACTION = 'mufu_upload_action';
    const NONCE_FIELD  = 'mufu_nonce';
    const FORM_FIELD   = 'mufu_upload_submit';
    const FILE_FIELD   = 'mufu_file';
    const TYPE_FIELD   = 'mufu_type';
    const MAX_SIZE     = 52428800; // 50MB

    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', [$this, 'handle_upload']);
        add_shortcode('member_uploads', [$this, 'shortcode']);
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', [$this, 'enqueue']);
    }

    public function enqueue() {
        wp_register_style('mufu-style', false);
        wp_enqueue_style('mufu-style');
        wp_add_inline_style('mufu-style', '
            .mufu-wrap { max-width: 720px; }
            .mufu-box { padding:16px; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px; margin: 16px 0; background:#fff; }
            .mufu-row { margin: 10px 0; }
            .mufu-msg { padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 6px; margin: 12px 0; }
            .mufu-ok { background: #e8f7ee; border: 1px solid #bfe8cf; color:#1f5b37; }
            .mufu-err { background: #fdecec; border: 1px solid #f5bcbc; color:#7a1c1c; }
            .mufu-files li { margin: 6px 0; }
        ');
    }

    private function uploads_base_dir() {
        $u = wp_upload_dir(null, false);
        $base = trailingslashit($u['basedir']) . 'user-files';
        $base = wp_normalize_path($base);
        return $base;
    }

    private function ensure_dir($path) {
        if (!file_exists($path)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($path);
        }
        $ht = trailingslashit($path) . '.htaccess';
        if (!file_exists($ht)) {
            @file_put_contents($ht, "Options -Indexes\n<FilesMatch \"\.(php|phtml|php3|php4|php5|php7|phps|cgi|pl|asp|aspx|jsp|shtml|sh)$\">\nDeny from all\n</FilesMatch>\n");
        }
        $idx = trailingslashit($path) . 'index.php';
        if (!file_exists($idx)) {
            @file_put_contents($idx, "<?php\n// Silence is golden.\n");
        }
    }

    private function user_dir($user_id) {
        $dir = trailingslashit($this->uploads_base_dir()) . 'user-' . intval($user_id);
        return $dir;
    }

    private function type_dir($user_id, $type) {
        $type = ($type === 'profile') ? 'profile' : 'documents';
        return trailingslashit($this->user_dir($user_id)) . $type;
    }

    private function safe_ext_from_name($filename) {
        $ext = strtolower(pathinfo($filename, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        $ext = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]/', '', $ext);
        return $ext;
    }

    private function allowed_exts($type) {
        $common = [
            'jpg','jpeg','png','gif','webp','bmp','tif','tiff','heic','heif',
            'pdf',
            'doc','docx','odt','rtf','txt',
            'xls','xlsx','ods','csv',
            'ppt','pptx','odp',
            'zip','rar','7z',
        ];
        $profile = ['jpg','jpeg','png','gif','webp'];
        $type = ($type === 'profile') ? 'profile' : 'documents';
        return ($type === 'profile') ? $profile : $common;
    }

    private function is_allowed($filename, $type) {
        $ext = $this->safe_ext_from_name($filename);
        if ($ext === '') return false;
        return in_array($ext, $this->allowed_exts($type), true);
    }

    private function random_name($ext) {
        $rand = wp_generate_password(18, false, false);
        $time = gmdate('YmdHis');
        return $time . '-' . $rand . ($ext ? '.' . $ext : '');
    }

    private function result_redirect($status, $message) {
        $url = remove_query_arg(['mufu_status', 'mufu_msg'], (isset($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']) ? esc_url_raw($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']) : home_url('/')));
        $url = add_query_arg([
            'mufu_status' => $status,
            'mufu_msg'    => rawurlencode($message),
        ], $url);
        wp_safe_redirect($url);
        exit;
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (empty($_POST[self::FORM_FIELD])) return;
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'You must be logged in to upload files.');
        }

        if (!isset($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD]) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD])), self::NONCE_ACTION)) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'Security check failed.');
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $type = isset($_POST[self::TYPE_FIELD]) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[self::TYPE_FIELD])) : 'document';
        $type = ($type === 'profile') ? 'profile' : 'document';

        if (!isset($_FILES[self::FILE_FIELD])) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'No file received.');
        }

        $f = $_FILES[self::FILE_FIELD];

        if (!is_array($f) || !isset($f['error'], $f['name'], $f['tmp_name'], $f['size'])) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'Invalid upload data.');
        }

        if ((int)$f['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'Upload failed with error code: ' . (int)$f['error']);
        }

        if (!is_uploaded_file($f['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'Possible file upload attack detected.');
        }

        $orig_name = sanitize_file_name($f['name']);
        if ($orig_name === '') {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'Invalid file name.');
        }

        if ((int)$f['size'] <= 0 || (int)$f['size'] > self::MAX_SIZE) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'File size must be between 1 byte and ' . size_format(self::MAX_SIZE) . '.');
        }

        $target_type = ($type === 'profile') ? 'profile' : 'documents';

        if (!$this->is_allowed($orig_name, $type === 'profile' ? 'profile' : 'documents')) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'File type not allowed.');
        }

        $base = $this->uploads_base_dir();
        $user_dir = $this->user_dir($user_id);
        $type_dir = $this->type_dir($user_id, $type === 'profile' ? 'profile' : 'documents');

        $this->ensure_dir($base);
        $this->ensure_dir($user_dir);
        $this->ensure_dir($type_dir);

        $ext = $this->safe_ext_from_name($orig_name);
        $new_name = $this->random_name($ext);
        $dest = trailingslashit($type_dir) . $new_name;
        $dest = wp_normalize_path($dest);

        if ($type === 'profile') {
            foreach (glob(trailingslashit($type_dir) . '*') as $old) {
                if (is_file($old)) {
                    @unlink($old);
                }
            }
        }

        if (!@move_uploaded_file($f['tmp_name'], $dest)) {
            $this->result_redirect('err', 'Could not move uploaded file.');
        }

        @chmod($dest, 0644);

        $uploads = wp_upload_dir(null, false);
        $relative = str_replace(wp_normalize_path(trailingslashit($uploads['basedir'])), '', $dest);
        $url = trailingslashit($uploads['baseurl']) . str_replace(DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR, '/', ltrim($relative, '/'));

        if ($type === 'profile') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'mufu_profile_file_path', $dest);
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'mufu_profile_file_url', esc_url_raw($url));
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'mufu_profile_file_name', $orig_name);
        } else {
            $list = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mufu_documents', true);
            if (!is_array($list)) $list = [];
            $list[] = [
                'name' => $orig_name,
                'path' => $dest,
                'url'  => esc_url_raw($url),
                'time' => time(),
                'size' => (int)$f['size'],
                'ext'  => $ext,
            ];
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'mufu_documents', $list);
        }

        $this->result_redirect('ok', 'Upload successful.');
    }

    private function get_messages() {
        $status = isset($_GET['mufu_status']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['mufu_status'])) : '';
        $msg = isset($_GET['mufu_msg']) ? rawurldecode(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['mufu_msg']))) : '';
        if (!$status || !$msg) return '';
        $class = ($status === 'ok') ? 'mufu-msg mufu-ok' : 'mufu-msg mufu-err';
        return '<div class="' . esc_attr($class) . '">' . esc_html($msg) . '</div>';
    }

    private function render_profile_section($user_id) {
        $url = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mufu_profile_file_url', true);
        $name = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mufu_profile_file_name', true);

        $out  = '<div class="mufu-box">';
        $out .= '<h3>Profile Picture</h3>';
        if ($url) {
            $out .= '<div class="mufu-row">';
            $out .= '<div><strong>Current:</strong> ' . esc_html($name ? $name : basename($url)) . '</div>';
            $out .= '<div class="mufu-row"><img src="' . esc_url($url) . '" alt="" style="max-width:160px;height:auto;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:4px;"></div>';
            $out .= '</div>';
        } else {
            $out .= '<div class="mufu-row">No profile picture uploaded.</div>';
        }

        $out .= '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">';
        $out .= wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_FIELD, true, false);
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="' . esc_attr(self::TYPE_FIELD) . '" value="profile">';
        $out .= '<div class="mufu-row"><input type="file" name="' . esc_attr(self::FILE_FIELD) . '" accept="image/*" required></div>';
        $out .= '<div class="mufu-row"><button type="submit" name="' . esc_attr(self::FORM_FIELD) . '" value="1">Upload Profile Picture</button></div>';
        $out .= '</form>';
        $out .= '</div>';

        return $out;
    }

    private function render_documents_section($user_id) {
        $docs = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mufu_documents', true);
        if (!is_array($docs)) $docs = [];

        $out  = '<div class="mufu-box">';
        $out .= '<h3>Documents</h3>';

        if ($docs) {
            $out .= '<ul class="mufu-files">';
            $docs_sorted = $docs;
            usort($docs_sorted, function($a, $b) {
                $ta = isset($a['time']) ? (int)$a['time'] : 0;
                $tb = isset($b['time']) ? (int)$b['time'] : 0;
                return $tb <=> $ta;
            });
            foreach ($docs_sorted as $d) {
                $name = isset($d['name']) ? $d['name'] : 'Document';
                $url  = isset($d['url']) ? $d['url'] : '';
                $time = isset($d['time']) ? (int)$d['time'] : 0;
                $size = isset($d['size']) ? (int)$d['size'] : 0;

                $out .= '<li>';
                $out .= $url ? '<a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' . esc_html($name) . '</a>' : esc_html($name);
                if ($time) $out .= ' <small>(' . esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), $time)) . ')</small>';
                if ($size) $out .= ' <small>' . esc_html(size_format($size)) . '</small>';
                $out .= '</li>';
            }
            $out .= '</ul>';
        } else {
            $out .= '<div class="mufu-row">No documents uploaded.</div>';
        }

        $out .= '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">';
        $out .= wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_FIELD, true, false);
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="' . esc_attr(self::TYPE_FIELD) . '" value="document">';
        $out .= '<div class="mufu-row"><input type="file" name="' . esc_attr(self::FILE_FIELD) . '" required></div>';
        $out .= '<div class="mufu-row"><button type="submit" name="' . esc_attr(self::FORM_FIELD) . '" value="1">Upload Document</button></div>';
        $out .= '<div class="mufu-row"><small>Allowed: images, PDF, DOC/DOCX, XLS/XLSX, PPT/PPTX, TXT, CSV, ODT/ODS/ODP, ZIP/RAR/7Z. Max size: ' . esc_html(size_format(self::MAX_SIZE)) . '.</small></div>';
        $out .= '</form>';

        $out .= '</div>';

        return $out;
    }

    public function shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="mufu-wrap"><div class="mufu-msg mufu-err">You must be logged in to upload files.</div></div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts([
            'show_profile'   => '1',
            'show_documents' => '1',
        ], $atts, 'member_uploads');

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();

        $out  = '<div class="mufu-wrap">';
        $out .= $this->get_messages();

        if ($atts['show_profile'] === '1') {
            $out .= $this->render_profile_section($user_id);
        }
        if ($atts['show_documents'] === '1') {
            $out .= $this->render_documents_section($user_id);
        }

        $out .= '</div>';
        return $out;
    }
}

new Member_User_File_Uploads();
